phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'inizio della Via dell'Amore, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leen-TEE-tsoh DEL-lah VEE-ah del-la-MOH-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Dalla stazione di Riomaggiore, segui le indicazioni.
likely_response.pronunciation: DAHL-lah stah-tsee-OH-neh DEE ree-oh-mahj-jee-OH-reh seh-GOO-ee LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
likely_response.translation_en: From Riomaggiore station, follow the signs.

responses.english: From Riomaggiore station, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: DAHL-lah stah-tsee-OH-neh DEE ree-oh-mahj-jee-OH-reh seh-GOO-ee LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
responses.french: Dalla stazione di Riomaggiore, segui le indicazioni.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, la Via dell'Amore è aperta oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, lah VEE-ah del-la-MOH-reh EH a-PER-tah OD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa la Cinque Terre Card, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah lah CHEEN-kweh TER-reh CARD, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso acquistare il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-vehs POS-soh ah-kwee-STA-reh eel bee-lyET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono bagni pubblici qui vicino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh BAH-nyee POOB-blee-see kwee vee-CHEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è il punto migliore per le foto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kwahl EH eel POON-toh mee-lyoh-reh per leh FOH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh
